NCT02993523.name: VIALE-A
NCT02993523.group: Untreated AML ineligible for intensive chemo, venetoclax + azacitidine vs azacitidine + placebo
NCT02993523.snippet: Source: DiNardo CD et al. N Engl J Med 2020;383:617-629 (VIALE-A).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 431 adults with newly diagnosed AML, aged 75 or older or with comorbidities precluding intensive induction, randomized 2:1 double-blind to venetoclax 400 mg PO daily plus azacitidine 75 mg/m2 SC/IV on days 1-7 of each 28-day cycle (n=286) or azacitidine + placebo (n=145). Treatment continued until progression or intolerance.

evidence.label: Primary - Overall Survival
evidence.text: Median overall survival: venetoclax + azacitidine 14.7 months vs azacitidine alone 9.6 months; hazard ratio 0.66 (95% CI 0.52 to 0.85; P<0.001). 34% relative reduction in risk of death. Primary endpoint met.

evidence.label: Secondary - CR + CRi and MRD
evidence.text: CR + CRi rate: venetoclax-aza 66.4% (190/286) vs aza 28.3% (41/145); odds ratio approximately 5.0 (95% CI 3.3-7.7). MRD negativity at CR + CRi was higher in the combination arm. Median time to first response ~1.3 months.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IRT randomization stratified by age, cytogenetic risk, region. D2 LOW - double-blind placebo-controlled. D3 LOW - 97% primary follow-up. D4 LOW - response criteria centrally adjudicated per 2017 ELN criteria. D5 LOW - SAP pre-locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Participant must have confirmation of Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) by World Health Organization (WHO) criteria, previously untreated and be ineligible for treatment with a standard cytarabine and anthracycline induction regimen due age or comorbidities.~* Participant must be >= 18 years of age.~* Participant must have a projected life expectancy of at least 12 weeks.~* Participant must be considered ineligible for induction therapy defined by the following:~  a. >= 75 ye...

NCT03069352.name: VIALE-C
NCT03069352.group: Untreated AML unfit for intensive chemo, venetoclax + LDAC vs LDAC + placebo (6-month add-on follow-up analysis)
NCT03069352.snippet: Source: Wei AH et al. Blood 2020;135:2137-2145 (VIALE-C).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 211 adults with newly diagnosed AML, unfit for intensive chemo (age 75+ or comorbidities), randomized 2:1 double-blind to venetoclax 600 mg PO daily plus LDAC 20 mg/m2 SC on days 1-10 of each 28-day cycle (n=143) or LDAC + placebo (n=68).

evidence.label: Primary - Overall Survival
evidence.text: Initial analysis median OS: venetoclax-LDAC 7.2 months vs LDAC 4.1 months; hazard ratio 0.75 (95% CI 0.52 to 1.07; P=0.11) - did not reach the pre-specified significance threshold. With 6 months of additional follow-up, hazard ratio 0.70 (95% CI 0.50 to 0.98; P=0.04). Updated analysis achieved significance.

evidence.label: Secondary - CR + CRi and Transfusion Independence
evidence.text: CR + CRi: venetoclax-LDAC 48% (69/143) vs LDAC 13% (9/68); odds ratio 6.4 (95% CI 2.9-14.1). RBC and platelet transfusion-independence rates higher in combination arm.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IRT randomization. D2 LOW - double-blind matched placebo. D3 LOW - 94% completion. D4 LOW - centrally adjudicated responses per ELN. D5 SOME CONCERNS - initial primary analysis did not meet significance; the 6-month updated analysis was pre-specified as a secondary supportive endpoint. Editors should note the estimand distinction.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~1. Participant must have histological confirmation of acute myeloid leukemia (AML) by World Health Organization criteria, be ineligible for intensive induction chemotherapy and either be:~   * ≥ 75 years of age OR~  * ≥ 18 to 74 years of age and fulfill at least one criteria associated with lack of fitness for intensive induction chemotherapy:~     * Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group (ECOG) performance status of 2 - 3~    * Cardiac history of congestive heart failure (CHF) ...

title: RapidMeta Haematology | Venetoclax plus Hypomethylator or LDAC for Untreated AML v1.0
h1: Venetoclax plus Hypomethylator or LDAC \u2014 Patient Summary
